textByHash.4c5957e870defb40c3cce0021e7fea01b0bc9989: 'He kicked and he punched, it was quite the show! But he tripped on a rock and stubbed his toe!'
textByHash.a4ed0b9e67eddcd947acd8901073f3aed2bea369: I haven't had that many, have I?
textByHash.c1b27c3cd28f3e5ed2ae5aef3c0dbb82a2485eec: 'Oh there once was a dwarf named Tonalo! He started a fight with a buffalo!'
textByHash.d3e530b318d5102c707e8d104efa76349190ae77: Hello! I've had a few to drink!
textByHash.dcbe9bf8b6de5919264c114bd769fc4c67cdcf95: What? I didn't even do it!
textByHash.e5583826a92e69c407934519d1e1ef17ea4aa6b5: Yes please! How many do you have?
